name: Cheesecake Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine corn flake crumbs and oil in a small mixing bowl. Press into prepared pan.
4. Bake the crust for 10 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, heat marshmallows and milk over low heat until marshmallows are melted. Cool for 10 minutes.
6. In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream, cream cheese, and vanilla extract. Mix until all is smooth.
7. Stir in the marshmallow mixture and fruit cocktail into the mixing bowl.
8. Turn the filling into the prebaked crust. Chill until set.
